stage1_reason: Both commits directly respond to kernel API changes: first replaces manual backlight property checks with helper function due to deprecated fb_blank field; second adds explicit includes due to removal of drm_framebuffer.h from drm_crtc.h
stage2_reason: Driver commit 'ad4fd3b1dfd3' replaces manual backlight property checks with backlight helper function. Kernel commit '2144d00ed0db' introduces backlight_get_brightness() helper function, which directly provides the API being adopted. The timing (v5.8->v5.9 kernel range) and keyword 'backlight_get_brightness' match the driver migration need.
